title: A Chance Encounter
scene_summary: An adventurous human, Kael, and his pet wolf, Frost, meet a curious elf, Lirien, in the heart of the Whispering Woods. As they cross paths, the three discover a shared love for the beauty of nature.

lines.speaker: Kael
lines.original_text: Ah, the Whispering Woods. I've heard tales of ancient secrets hidden within these trees.
lines.tts_text: Ah, the Whispering Woods. I've heard tales of ancient secrets hidden within these trees.

lines.speaker: Lirien
lines.original_text: Ah, you're new around here? I can tell by your awestruck gaze. Welcome to our humble home!
lines.tts_text: Ah, you're new around here? I can tell by your awestruck gaze. Welcome to our humble home!

lines.speaker: Lirien
lines.original_text: I see you're not alone! You're accompanied by a noble companion. Tell me, what's the story behind that magnificent coat?
lines.tts_text: I see you're not alone! You're accompanied by a noble companion. Tell me, what's the story behind that magnificent coat?

lines.speaker: Kael
lines.original_text: Frost here is more than just my loyal companion – she's the embodiment of good fortune and protection.
lines.tts_text: Frost here is more than just my loyal companion – she's the embodiment of good fortune and protection.
